config.seed_text: An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

model.notes: Fastest baseline; useful as a collapse-prone small reference model.

records.output_text: The result is that when you start creating something interesting (but not so much boring), your whole work becomes repetitive with all kinds or ideas before repeating them again as needed... You will end up getting bored while writing about things new!

records.output_text: And when your brain asks you what kind of verb would that mean? It depends upon how long or even small (for example) those three variables come into play during processing time! How do we keep our eyes peeled where possible before being able go further down memory chain so as not to accidentally confuse some people who don't know exactly why their brains believe something just like 'they're talking' at all!? Why does somebody assume anything but saying no matter which way past them while others get overconfident about any other subject... WHY DOES someone think anyone has an idea yet anyway?! Or maybe he hasn`t thought twice now trying it out

It depends upon how long or even small (for example) those three variables come into play during processing time! Why does somebody assume anything but saying no matter which way past them while others get overconfident about any other subject... WHY DOES someone think anyone has an idea yet anyway?! Or maybe he hasn`t thought twice now trying it out
